data.name: Strip Royale
data.detailed_description:
Strip Royale is a bold and unapologetically adult card game that fuses the classic gameplay of Snap with an immersive and realistic 3D strip experience.

Face off in intense rounds of Snap, matching cards and strategizing to rack up points. Each level challenges you to reach a set score—if you succeed, your opponent, a beautifully rendered 3D model, will remove a piece of clothing. Your ultimate goal? Undress your rival completely and unlock a fully animated, explicit sex scene, unique to each character.

Each girl features her own set of detailed poses and positions. Earn enough points, choose the pose you want to watch, and experience an interactive, uncensored adult encounter. Ready to finish? Watch the climax scene and move on to the next challenge.

But be careful: Strip Royale isn’t just about luck. Choose from powerful jokers at the start of each round to upgrade your deck, enhance your strategy, and gain an edge. Some jokers benefit only you, others shake up the match for both sides. Fail to hit the target score, and you’ll lose your progress and your upgrades—this is a true roguelike experience.

Key Features:

– Classic Snap card mechanics with an adult twist

– Realistic 3D models and fully animated explicit scenes

– Roguelike progression: build your deck with powerful jokers, but risk losing everything on failure

– Unique sex scenes, positions, and animations for each girl

– For adults only: features full nudity and uncensored sexual content

data.short_description: Play classic Snap to score points, strip your opponent with each level, and unlock sizzling 3D sex scenes with every win! Strengthen your deck with jokers—victory in Strip Royale is rewarded with the naked truth!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
